# Born Again Home Remodeling and Roofing

Mississippi's premier roofing, storm restoration, and home remodeling contractor. Built on faith, integrity, and expert craftsmanship.

## Contact Information
- **Phone:** (601) 573-6178
- **Address:** Jackson Metro Area, Mississippi
- **Website:** [bornagainroofing.com](https://www.bornagainroofing.com)

## Official Hours of Operation
- **Monday - Friday:** 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM
- **Saturday - Sunday:** Closed (24/7 Emergency Tarping Available)

## Core Services
1. **Residential Roofing:** Complete shingle installations, GAF architectural shingles, roof repairs, wood rafter inspections, soffit and fascia repairs.
2. **Storm Damage Restoration:** Emergency storm tarping, leak patches, hail damage inspections, wind damage restoration, insurance claims adjuster assistance.
3. **Metal Roofing:** Standing seam panel installations, leak troubleshooting, reflective energy-efficient roof systems.
4. **Home Remodeling:** Custom bathroom upgrades, subfloor water rot repairs, custom tile showers, kitchen remodeling, custom cabinetry, interior/exterior painting, drywall/sheetrock hanging, flooring (LVP/hardwood), framing, and attic insulation.

## Service Coverage Areas
Serving the following cities in Central Mississippi:
- Jackson, Brandon, Byram, Canton, Clinton, Crystal Springs, Florence, Flowood, Gluckstadt, Hazlehurst, Madison, Pearl, Raymond, Richland, Ridgeland, Terry, Utica, Vicksburg, Yazoo City.

## Website Pages

- [Home](https://www.bornagainroofing.com/) - Core business summary & Free estimate request form
- [About Us](https://www.bornagainroofing.com/about-us/) - Company philosophy and team overview
- [Contact Us](https://www.bornagainroofing.com/contact-us/) - Estimate request picker with appointment scheduling
- [Reviews](https://www.bornagainroofing.com/reviews/) - Customer Reviews, verified local feedback & star ratings
- [Project Pins](https://www.bornagainroofing.com/pins/) - Interactive gallery of recent local jobs filtered by service and city
- [Areas We Service](https://www.bornagainroofing.com/areas-we-service/) - Locations directory with 19 city-specific pages

### Residential Roofing
- [Residential Roofing](https://www.bornagainroofing.com/residential-roofing/) - Index page for all residential roofing services
- [Roof Repair](https://www.bornagainroofing.com/residential-roofing/roof-repair/) - Minor leak repairs & shingle patching
- [Roof Installation](https://www.bornagainroofing.com/residential-roofing/roof-installation/) - Premium shingle replacements
- [Asphalt Shingle Roof Repair and Replacement](https://www.bornagainroofing.com/residential-roofing/asphalt-shingle-roof-repair-and-replacement/) - Standard GAF shingle systems
- [Roof Inspections](https://www.bornagainroofing.com/residential-roofing/roof-inspections/) - Multi-point storm reports
- [Soffit and Fascia Repair](https://www.bornagainroofing.com/residential-roofing/soffit-and-fascia-repair/) - Eave trim and wood rot repairs

### Storm Damage Roof Repair
- [Storm Damage Roof Repair](https://www.bornagainroofing.com/storm-damage-roof-repair/) - Index page for all storm damage services
- [Emergency Roof Repair](https://www.bornagainroofing.com/storm-damage-roof-repair/emergency-roof-repair/) - 24/7 emergency leak seals and tarping
- [Roof Patches and Leak Repair](https://www.bornagainroofing.com/storm-damage-roof-repair/roof-patches-and-leak-repair/) - Targeted leak sealing
- [Hail Damage Roof Repair](https://www.bornagainroofing.com/storm-damage-roof-repair/hail-damage-roof-repair/) - Class 4 impact shingle restoration
- [Wind Damage Roof Repair](https://www.bornagainroofing.com/storm-damage-roof-repair/wind-damage-roof-repair/) - Shingle blow-off replacement
- [Roof Insurance Claims Help](https://www.bornagainroofing.com/storm-damage-roof-repair/roof-insurance-claims-help/) - Adjuster reports & claim filing support

### Metal Roofing
- [Metal Roofing](https://www.bornagainroofing.com/metal-roofing-repair-and-installation/) - Index page for all metal roofing services
- [Standing Seam Metal Roof Installation](https://www.bornagainroofing.com/metal-roofing-repair-and-installation/standing-seam-metal-roof-installation/) - Hidden fastener panels

### Home Remodeling
- [Bathroom Remodeling](https://www.bornagainroofing.com/bathroom-remodeling/) - Custom shower renovations & subfloor repair
- [Kitchen Remodeling](https://www.bornagainroofing.com/kitchen-remodeling/) - Cabinet installations & paint styling
- [Whole House Remodeling](https://www.bornagainroofing.com/whole-house-remodeling/) - Structural remodels & layout transformations

### Specialty Services
- [Painting](https://www.bornagainroofing.com/painting/) - Interior and exterior residential painting
- [Plumbing](https://www.bornagainroofing.com/plumbing/) - Fixture fittings & line checks
- [Electrical](https://www.bornagainroofing.com/electrical/) - Ceiling fan mounts & safety wiring
- [Flooring](https://www.bornagainroofing.com/flooring/) - Hardwood, laminate, and LVP installations
- [Tile Service](https://www.bornagainroofing.com/tile-service/) - Backsplashes & bathroom tiling
- [Sheetrock](https://www.bornagainroofing.com/sheetrock/) - Mudding, taping, and drywall patches
- [Insulation](https://www.bornagainroofing.com/insulation/) - Attic fiberglass and blow-in R-value setups
- [Framing](https://www.bornagainroofing.com/framing/) - Structural rafters and wood stud carpentry
- [Trim](https://www.bornagainroofing.com/trim/) - Fascia trim, crown moldings, and finish millwork
- [Skylight Repair and Replacement](https://www.bornagainroofing.com/skylight-repair-and-replacement/) - Flashing seals and dome replacements

### Synthetic Roofing
- [Synthetic Shingles](https://www.bornagainroofing.com/synthetic-shingles/) - Premium composite shake and tile roofing alternatives
- [Synthetic Slate Roof Installation](https://www.bornagainroofing.com/synthetic-slate-roof-installation/) - Lightweight estate slate polymer shingles
- [Synthetic Tile Roofing](https://www.bornagainroofing.com/synthetic-tile-roofing/) - Class 4 impact Spanish polymer tiles
- [Synthetic Wood Roofing](https://www.bornagainroofing.com/synthetic-wood-roofing/) - Rot-resistant cedar shake composite roofing
